description: Trendy winter beanie hat for girls with detachable faux fur pom poms. This cosy chunky knit hat is an essential for any girls winter wardrobe. The hat comes with a choice of 2 interchangeable pom poms so you get two different looks from the same hat! Simply clip the pom poms on and off with a button clip fastener. Available in a range of colours to liven up any outfit. Suitable for ages 3-12
